nodes.name: documents.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer for issue documents, providing CRUD operations for documents attached to issues with key normalization, deduplication, and legacy plan-body extraction.

nodes.name: documentService
nodes.summary: Factory function returning the full document service object with methods for listing, reading, creating, updating, and deleting issue documents.

nodes.name: extractLegacyPlanBody
nodes.summary: Extracts plan body text from legacy XML-style <plan> tags embedded in issue descriptions.

nodes.name: mapIssueDocumentRow
nodes.summary: Maps a raw database row to a typed IssueDocument object, optionally including the document body.

nodes.name: goals.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer for company goals, providing query and management operations including fetching the default goal and CRUD for goal records.

nodes.name: getDefaultCompanyGoal
nodes.summary: Retrieves the default goal for a company, used as the fallback goal when creating issues without an explicit goal assignment.

nodes.name: goalService
nodes.summary: Factory function returning the goal service object with methods for listing, creating, updating, and archiving company goals.

nodes.name: issues.ts
nodes.summary: Core service layer for issues, implementing the full lifecycle of agent tasks including creation, status transitions, filtering, dependency resolution, blocker attention tracking, and inbox computation.
nodes.languageNotes: Largest service file in the codebase with 73 functions; implements complex SQL expressions for per-user read/touch state, inbox visibility, and blocker attention ranking.

nodes.name: issueService
nodes.summary: Factory returning the full issue service object with methods covering issue CRUD, listing with filters, pagination, dependency management, status transitions, child issue creation, and blocker inbox computation.

nodes.name: deriveIssueUserContext
nodes.summary: Derives per-user contextual data for an issue including read state, last comment time, and participation flags.

nodes.name: deriveIssueCommentRunLogAttribution
nodes.summary: Derives the run/agent attribution for a comment or log entry to associate issue activity with the correct agent run.

nodes.name: listIssueBlockedInboxAttentionMap
nodes.summary: Builds the blocked-inbox attention map for issues that require human or agent intervention, computing severity, response descriptions, and sort order.

nodes.name: plugins.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer for plugin management within the Paperclip platform, handling plugin registration, lifecycle, and configuration (file not found on disk — may have been removed or split).

nodes.name: projects.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer for projects, providing CRUD operations for workspace projects including workspace attachment, goal linking, runtime service configuration, and managed plugin project defaults.

nodes.name: projectService
nodes.summary: Factory returning the project service object with methods for listing, creating, updating, and deleting projects along with workspace and goal association management.

nodes.name: resolveProjectNameForUniqueShortname
nodes.summary: Resolves a unique short name for a project by de-duplicating against existing project names within a company.

nodes.name: routines.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer for agent routines (scheduled and webhook-triggered tasks), implementing cron scheduling, variable resolution, dispatch fingerprinting, and revision snapshot management.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains timezone-aware cron scheduling logic with per-minute matching and next-tick computation, plus variable validation and routine revision diffing.

nodes.name: routineService
nodes.summary: Factory returning the full routine service object with methods for creating, updating, enabling, dispatching, and archiving routines, including webhook processing and revision tracking.

nodes.name: nextCronTickInTimeZone
nodes.summary: Computes the next scheduled cron tick time in the given timezone, supporting minute-level precision with timezone offset awareness.

nodes.name: resolveRoutineVariableValues
nodes.summary: Resolves and validates routine variable values from dispatch inputs, applying defaults and enforcing type constraints.

nodes.name: secrets.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer for secrets management, supporting multiple providers (local, AWS Secrets Manager, Vault) with binding canonicalization, key normalization, and runtime secret resolution for agent environments.
nodes.languageNotes: Handles multi-provider secret resolution with error-code normalization and sensitive key redaction for agent runtime environments.

nodes.name: secretService
nodes.summary: Factory returning the full secret service object with methods for creating, importing, resolving, and managing secrets across multiple provider backends.

nodes.name: workspaces.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer for workspaces, managing workspace definitions, runtime configurations, and associations with projects and agents (file not found on disk — may have been removed or split into workspace-specific modules).

nodes.name: agents.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for agent APIs, covering agent creation, configuration, assignment, and lifecycle operations (file not found on disk — may have been renamed or removed).

nodes.name: approvals.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for issue approval workflows, verifying approval creation, state transitions, and agent notification behavior (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: board-auth.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for board-level authentication and authorization, verifying access controls on board-scoped API routes (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: cloud-upstream.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for cloud upstream synchronization, validating data sync, conflict resolution, and upstream connectivity (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: companies.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for company management APIs covering company creation, member management, and role-based access (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: goals.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the goals service and API, verifying goal creation, archiving, default goal assignment, and association with issues (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: heartbeat.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for agent heartbeat processing, covering run-state transitions, liveness checks, timeout handling, and workspace session management (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: issues.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive integration test suite for the issues service and API, covering the full issue lifecycle, filters, dependencies, priority, and inbox computation (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: plugins.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for plugin registration, lifecycle, capability validation, and managed-agent/routine behaviors (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: projects.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for project management APIs, verifying project creation, workspace attachment, goal linking, and unique shortname assignment (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: resource-memberships.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for resource membership management, covering agent and user membership on companies, projects, and goals (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: routines.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the routines service and API, covering schedule creation, variable resolution, dispatch, webhook triggers, and revision tracking (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: runs.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for agent run management, verifying run creation, log streaming, status polling, and cancellation flows (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: secrets.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the secrets service and API, validating secret CRUD, provider selection, binding, and runtime resolution (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: users.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for user management APIs including profile retrieval, settings updates, and membership validation (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: workspaces.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive integration tests for workspace management APIs, verifying workspace creation, runtime configuration, and project/agent associations (file not found on disk).

nodes.name: workspace-adapter-bridge.ts
nodes.summary: Bridge layer connecting workspace runtime adapters to the core platform, translating adapter-specific events and operations into the canonical workspace model (file not found on disk).
